Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and the next occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration of the period starting at SW-Reviewer Declined and ending at SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is now due
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Total time it takes to perform SW-AE Assign Reviewers after SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Average time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Declined compared to the time from SW-Initial Reviewer Selection to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time for the sequence SW-Reviewer Declined → SW-AE Assign Reviewers → SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Declined measured as the interval until a new reviewer agrees (SW-Reviewer Agreed) or the process moves to Assign a Different Editor
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Declined and Unassign Reviewer
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'Unassign Reviewer'

Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Declined and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in variants that include both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-EIC Major Revision in cases where the manuscript eventually receives a major revision decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Average duration between consecutive occurrences of SW-Reviewer Declined within the same case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Declined to the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision) grouped by variant type
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Minimum time it takes to transition from SW-Reviewer Declined to SW-Reviewer Unavailable when both occur in sequence
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Unavailable'

Name: Average time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Declined compared to the time between SW-AE Assign Reviewers and SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Time elapsed from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Declined versus to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Total time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Reviewer Declined in variants where checklist completion precedes reviewer assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Average time it takes the process to recover from SW-Reviewer Declined by reaching the next stable state (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed or SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
